channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Chelsea agree club-record £117m deal for Rogers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Chelsea shatters transfer records with a £117m deal for Aston Villa’s Morgan Rogers. This club-record signing marks a new era for the Blues.
Read More: https://punchng.com/chelsea-agree-club-record-117m-deal-for-rogers/

item.title: Police nab fake pastor, woman after rescuing abducted four-week-old baby
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Niger State Police rescued a four-week-old baby and arrested a fake pastor and his accomplice involved in the baby abduction in Minna.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-nab-fake-pastor-woman-after-rescuing-abducted-four-week-old-baby/

item.title: 'Statement of intent!' | How Chelsea agreed HUGE £117m deal for Rogers!
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Sky Sports News' Kaveh Solhekol breaks down Chelsea's £117m deal for Morgan Rogers and what he could add to Xabi Alonso's side.

item.title: Police arrest robbery suspect in Oyo, recover stolen bike
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Oyo State Police Command arrests a robbery suspect, Shafiu Nuhu, who attacked a motorcyclist in Ibadan and recovered the stolen Bajaj Boxer bike.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-robbery-suspect-in-oyo-recover-stolen-bike/

item.title: Lamine Yamal Hails Lionel Messi as the Greatest of All Time
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Lamine Yamal has once again expressed his admiration for Lionel Messi, describing the Argentine icon as the greatest player in football history while insisting he is determined to forge his own path. The teenage winger, who has often been compared to the eight-time Ballon d'Or winner due to his rise

item.title: Police raid drug warehouse in Yobe, arrest suspect, recover hard drugs
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Operatives of the Yobe State Police Command have arrested a suspected drug baron and a notorious kidnapping kingpin operating within and outside the state. This was disclosed in a press release signed by the Police Public Relations Officer, SP Dungus Abdulkarim, on Saturday. According to the stateme

item.title: NiMet, Partners Train Extension Officers On Climate Risk Management
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigerian Meteorological Agency, (NiMet), and its partners have concluded a 10-day Climate Risk Management in Agricultural Extension training for extension professionals in Abuja. The Training of Trainers workshop, which ended on Friday, was organized in collaboration with the International Lives

item.title: Police Arrest Suspected Armed Robber, Recover Stolen Motorcycle in Ibadan
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Oyo State Police Command has arrested a suspected armed robber and recovered a stolen motorcycle following a robbery attack on a commercial motorcyclist in Ibadan. The Command disclosed this in a statement issued on Saturday by its Public Relations Officer, DSP Ayanlade Olayinka. According to th

He

item.title: Mercy Eke Expresses Regret For Featuring On BBNaija Season 4
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Big Brother Naija (BBNaija) Season 4 winner, Mercy Eke has expressed regret for participating in the reality TV show due to her inability to find a life partner years after the show ended. Eke, who spoke about her love experience in an emotional interview on Toke Moment, a podcast show hosted by

item.title: Netflix is spending big money on sports. Is the company making the right bets?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The streaming service says live programming helps draw in new subscribers, but investors have become disillusioned with Netflix’s broader engagement trends.

item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Abia State Police Command has arrested four suspected drug peddlers and recovered suspected hard drugs and cannabis during an intelligence-led operation in Osisioma Local Government Area of the state. The Command disclosed this in a statement on Saturday by its Public Relations Officer, DSP Maur

item.description: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

item.title: Springboks nil Wales again despite errors in seven-try Durban thrashing
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Wales failed to score a single point once more against South Africa as the Springboks ran out convincing 43-0 Nations Championship winners in Durban.

item.description:
Oyebamiji’s running mate inaugurates 360 grassroots canvassers in Odo Otin LGA for the upcoming Osun election, focusing on voter engagement.
Read More: https://punchng.com/osun-poll-oyebamijis-running-mate-unveils-360-grassroots-canvassers/

item.title: Herdsmen seize mourning siblings, mother’s corpse in Benue
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: "After repairing the car, they continued the journey because they were determined to take their mother's body home for burial" The post Herdsmen seize mourning siblings, mother’s corpse in Benue appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: China Warns UK Over British Steel Nationalisation, Demands Fair Resolution
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: China’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs has said it will closely monitor the United Kingdom’s nationalisation of British Steel, previously owned by a Chinese steelmaker. The UK government nationalised British Steel on Thursday, fully taking over the loss-making company, then under the ownership of Jingy

item.title: France vs England LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place playoff
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Live coverage and text updates from our commentary stream of the Bronze Final as Mbappe's France play Kane's England.

item.title: Kano Pension Board begins legal action to recover N5.3m mistaken payment
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Kano State Pension Board has commenced legal action to recover N5,346,587.16 mistakenly paid into the wrong bank account during a bulk pension payment through Jaiz Bank. In a statement on Saturday, the board’s Director of Finance, Sunusi Aminu Rano, said the error occurred during data colle

item.title: 'Not sure I'd want to be on pole!' - Antonelli's poisoned chalice in Verstappen start fight?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Kimi Antonelli admits starting Sunday's Belgian Grand Prix alongside Max Verstappen on the front row is "not going to be straightforward" at a track where holding pole position is often regarded as a poisoned chalice.

item.title: ‘Caretakers of waste’ – Atiku demands probe of Tinubu’s 2026 budget
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The African Democratic Congress, ADC, presidential in the 2027 general elections, Atiku Abubakar, has demanded for a thorough investigation of the 2026 Appropriation Act under the administration of President Bola Tinubu. Atiku’s call came after reports of more than N210 billion in alleged dupl

item.title: Nissi Ogulu Brings African Stories To Life Through Animation
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: While many creatives dedicate themselves to a single craft, Nissi Ogulu has built a career at the intersection of engineering, music and animation, driven by a passion for telling authentic African stories. The younger sister of Grammy-winning singer Burna Boy and granddaughter of Benson Idonije, th

item.title: Jimoh Ibrahim is uninformed: UN intervenes in nation’s internal affairs, By Owei Lakemfa
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: I do not support the call by Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde that international bodies like the United Nations (UN) should participate in probing the 56-day abduction of 39 pupils and six teachers in the state. In receiving the freed victims, he called “on the appropriate international human rights
